description_long: This is a modern multi-unit residential complex featuring two parallel rows of attached houses, each with flat roofs and clean, geometric lines. The buildings are arranged in an L-shaped configuration, enclosing a central driveway or pedestrian path. The exterior is characterized by a mix of white and gray surfaces, with accents of brown and green, likely representing wood paneling and landscaped areas. Large rectangular windows are arranged in regular, symmetrical rows along the facades, providing ample natural light to each unit. The complex includes multiple entryways, each marked by subtle overhangs or recessed doorways, and the ground level is bordered by green strips that suggest lawns or communal gardens. The overall design emphasizes functionality, density, and contemporary urban aesthetics.
description: A modern, L-shaped multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, symmetrical window rows, and landscaped green strips along the perimeter.
description_view_0: This view highlights the L-shaped layout, central driveway, and the main entry points to the units, with visible green landscaping.
description_view_1: This side view shows the long row of houses with symmetrical windows and the continuous green strip along the base.
description_view_2: This rear view emphasizes the back facades of the houses, flat roofs, and the parallel arrangement of the two rows.
description_view_3: This opposite side view displays the full length of the complex, the regular window pattern, and the landscaped perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with minimal overhangs, flat doors, and landscaped approach
